summary: Final Live Readiness Pack testing completed. Fixed 1 critical issue: Missing /api/admin/payment-settings backend endpoint. Created payment_settings_routes.py and wired to server.py. All 24 backend API tests pass. All frontend UI tests pass for Payment Settings, Launch Readiness, Affiliate Landing, and Affiliate Registration pages.

fixed_during_testing.issue: Missing /api/admin/payment-settings endpoint - PaymentSettingsPage.jsx was making API calls to non-existent endpoint
fixed_during_testing.fix: Created new payment_settings_routes.py with GET (list), POST (create/update), GET/{country_code}, DELETE endpoints. Added import and router to server.py

payment_gateway_status_api.notes: Returns kwikpay_configured=false (KWIKPAY_PUBLIC_KEY not set - MOCKED), bank_transfer_available=true

go_live_readiness_api.notes: Returns status, score (9/19), total, and checks object with boolean values

launch_readiness_audit_api.notes: Returns comprehensive audit with business_identity, payments, operations, commercial sections

launch_report_json_api.notes: Returns 401 without auth, returns readiness data with auth

payment_settings_api.notes: FIXED - Created new endpoint. Supports CRUD for country-level payment settings

payment_settings_page.notes: Page loads with form (Country Code, Currency, Bank Name, Account Name, Account Number, Branch, SWIFT Code, Payment Instructions). Save works, shows success toast, updates Configured Countries section

launch_readiness_page.notes: Page loads with Readiness Score (7/8), needs_attention status, checks grid (OK/Missing), Data Counts section, Export PDF button, Manual Checklist

affiliate_landing_page.notes: Displays 'Earn with Konekt' title, 'How it works' (3 steps), 'Why join?' benefits, Join as Affiliate and Affiliate Login buttons

affiliate_registration_page.notes: Form with Full Name, Email, Phone, Country (select), Password fields and 'Create Affiliate Account' button

navbar_earn_link.notes: Earn link present in public navbar header, links to /earn

critical_code_review_comments: PaymentSettingsPage.jsx was calling /api/admin/payment-settings which didn't exist - now fixed with new payment_settings_routes.py
All new backend routes properly use direct Motor client connection pattern consistent with rest of codebase
Resend email service is MOCKED (RESEND_API_KEY not set) - awaiting live credentials
KwikPay integration is MOCKED (KWIKPAY_PUBLIC_KEY not set) - awaiting live credentials
seed_data_creation: Created TZ payment settings entry for testing

mocked_apis.note: These integrations will work once live credentials are added to backend/.env

context_for_next_testing_agent: Final Live Readiness Pack fully tested. All 9 requested features passing: Email Status API, Payment Gateway Status API, Launch Readiness Audit API, Go-Live Readiness API, Payment Settings Page, Launch Readiness Page, Affiliate Landing Page, Affiliate Registration, and Navbar Earn link. Created missing /api/admin/payment-settings endpoint with full CRUD support. Resend and KwikPay remain mocked pending live credentials.
